description: Primary table for AI quality metrics. Each row compares an AI-generated reply with a human agent's reply for a customer support request. Tracks whether the human changed the AI output and classifies the type of change.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Primary key, auto-increment

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: When the record was created (default: now())

columns.name: status
columns.description: Record processing status

columns.name: thread_id
columns.description: Support thread identifier

columns.name: full_request
columns.description: Full text of the customer request

columns.name: subscription_info
columns.description: Subscription details (JSONB). Use ->>'key' for text access.

columns.name: tracking_info
columns.description: Tracking/shipping details (JSONB). Use ->>'key' for text access.

columns.name: human_reply
columns.description: The human agent's final reply (may include edits to AI output)

columns.name: ai_reply
columns.description: The AI-generated reply

columns.name: ai_reply_date
columns.description: When the AI reply was generated

columns.name: human_reply_date
columns.description: When the human agent replied

columns.name: comment
columns.description: Internal comment about the comparison

columns.name: request_subtype
columns.description: Request category (e.g., billing, shipping, general). Main grouping field for category analysis.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Email of the human agent/reviewer

columns.name: changes
columns.description: Detailed changes made by human (JSONB). Use ->>'key' for text access.

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Last update timestamp

columns.name: ticket_id
columns.description: Support ticket identifier

columns.name: human_reply_original
columns.description: Original human reply before any modifications

columns.name: check_count
columns.description: Number of times this record was checked/verified

columns.name: changed
columns.description: Legacy v3.x field. True if human changed the AI output.

columns.name: last_checked_at
columns.description: When this record was last checked

columns.name: improvement_suggestions
columns.description: AI-generated improvement suggestions (JSONB)

columns.name: similarity_score
columns.description: Similarity score between AI and human replies

columns.name: prompt_version
columns.description: Version of the AI prompt used (e.g., 'v3', 'v4'). Used for version comparison analysis.

columns.name: change_classification
columns.description: v4.0 penalty-based classification. Values: PERFECT_MATCH, STYLISTIC_EDIT, STRUCTURAL_FIX, TONAL_MISALIGNMENT, CONFUSING_VERBOSITY, MINOR_INFO_GAP, MAJOR_FUNCTIONAL_OMISSION, CRITICAL_FACT_ERROR, EXCL_WORKFLOW_SHIFT, EXCL_DATA_DISCREPANCY, HUMAN_INCOMPLETE. ALL UPPERCASE with underscores.

columns.name: root_cause
columns.description: Root cause analysis of the change

columns.name: draft_update_count
columns.description: Number of draft updates for this record

data_quality_notes: change_classification values are ALL_CAPS with underscores (e.g., 'PERFECT_MATCH' not 'perfect_match'). ai_approved field does NOT exist in this table — it exists in ticket_reviews. changed is the legacy boolean field. Classifications starting with 'EXCL_' and 'HUMAN_INCOMPLETE' are excluded from quality scoring. JSONB fields (subscription_info, tracking_info, changes, improvement_suggestions) require ->>'key' syntax. Can be NULL: change_classification, prompt_version, email, most text fields.
